'''mangaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oshidashi|oshidashi]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oshidashi|oshidashi]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mangaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mængæzæth|mængæzæth]] || [[word:mængæzæj|mængæzæj]] || [[word:mængæzæsh|mængæzæsh]] || [[word:mængæzæ|mængæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mangangazath|mangangazath]] || [[word:mangangazaj|mangangazaj]] || [[word:mangangazash|mangangazash]] || [[word:mangangaza|mangangaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mangazath|mangazath]] || [[word:mangazaj|mangazaj]] || [[word:mangazash|mangazash]] || [[word:mangaza|mangaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mangafzath|mangafzath]] || [[word:mangafzaj|mangafzaj]] || [[word:mangafzash|mangafzash]] || [[word:mangafzaf|mangafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mangazatha|mangazatha]] || [[word:mangazaja|mangazaja]] || [[word:mangazasha|mangazasha]] || [[word:mangazaka|mangazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mangazath|mangazath]] || [[word:mangazaj|mangazaj]] || [[word:mangazash|mangazash]] || [[word:mangaza|mangaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mangazathal|mangazathal]] || [[word:mangazajal|mangazajal]] || [[word:mangazashal|mangazashal]] || [[word:mangazakal|mangazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mangazathatha|mangazathatha]] || [[word:mangazajaja|mangazajaja]] || [[word:mangazashasha|mangazashasha]] || [[word:mangazaka|mangazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mangazathan|mangazathan]] || [[word:mangazajan|mangazajan]] || [[word:mangazashan|mangazashan]] || [[word:mangazakan|mangazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mangazathaoro|mangazathaoro]] || [[word:mangazajaoro|mangazajaoro]] || [[word:mangazashaoro|mangazashaoro]] || [[word:mangazakaoro|mangazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
